name: pencilerkali
description: PencilerKali.com — Bangladeshi AI-powered news + video automation platform

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/pencil-queue && npm run build -w packages/pencil-cloud && npm run build -w packages/pencil-voice && npm run build -w packages/pencil-video && npm run build -w packages/news-collector && npm run build -w packages/ai-rewriter && npm run build -w packages/publisher-fb && npm run build -w packages/publisher-yt
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web
